text:
Author: wen
Date: Mon Apr 28 14:38:51 2014
New Revision: 352507
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352507
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352507/

Log:
  - Update to 3.4.3
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		189064
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/astro/py-RO/Makefile
  head/astro/py-RO/distinfo

Modified: head/astro/py-RO/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/astro/py-RO/Makefile	Mon Apr 28 14:38:35 2014	(r352506)
+++ head/astro/py-RO/Makefile	Mon Apr 28 14:38:51 2014	(r352507)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	RO
-PORTVERSION=	3.4.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.4.3
 CATEGORIES=	astro python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Package of Python astronomical utilities
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/numpy/core/numeric.py:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-numpy
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
